race.comment: WEE GEORGIE WOOD (1) delivered an easy maiden win two back at Launceston then came from this same barrier for third last start at Carrick. Has some upside and should enjoy a cosy run. Big chance. HARBOUR SPRINGS (3) found winning form in good style last time, cruising home by close to 12m at this venue. Should have no excuses from another advantageous draw so could strike again. ASHANTE QUEEN (6) is heading the right way, improving last time out to finish 3m away in third at this circuit and distance. MONEYS NO ISSUE (10) continues a run of second row draws but is a contender with even luck.
